hero.title: Turn regulatory rules into clear actions.
hero.description: The first GDPR domain mode now supports company profile intake, service-driven recommendations, and evidence-focused checklists.

loading.fetching: The frontend is fetching the initial selector state.
loading.selector: Loading the GDPR rule selector and generating the first checklist.

checklistItems.label: Checklist items
checklistItems.description: {{done}} of {{total}} marked DONE · items ready for evidence collection

highPriority.label: High priority
highPriority.description: {{done}} of {{total}} marked DONE · controls to address first

actions.title: Choose what to work on
actions.description: Start a new assessment or reopen a saved one. Existing assessments stay editable so teams can continue evidence collection over time.

history.title: Assessment summaries
history.empty: No saved assessments yet. Create a new assessment to start building history.
history.unexpectedLoadError: The assessment could not be loaded.

selectorUnavailable.title: Rule unavailable
selectorUnavailable.message: The frontend could not load the backend selector, so no live input controls are available yet.
